impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a narrower next instruction before any further worker attempt: inspect existing frontier validation evidence first, supersede the blocked task when already covered, or retry with one syntax-preflightable file only. It reduces repeated SyntaxError, py_compile, and TypeScript parse rollbacks by making broad rewrites ineligible until syntax-stable supervisor tasks pass.
summary: Add deterministic task-board guidance for the blocked checkbox-108 syntax-recovery loop and park retries behind one-file syntax-preflight guardrails.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
